summary: The first tracked release of aproprose.
highlights: Managed novel projects: create a new novel, then add, rename, reorder, and delete chapters from the sidebar.
Rich-text editing with bold and italic from the selection toolbar or Cmd/Ctrl+B and Cmd/Ctrl+I, plus centered scene-break headings.
Split and carve blocks directly from a text selection.
AI panel with brainstorm chat, click-to-generate drafting, and per-block edit suggestions you can review and accept or reject.
Pick your OpenAI model in Settings; the assistant stays gated until a key and model are set.
Git and GitHub backup and sync with a full-screen diff review.
Command palette (Cmd/Ctrl+K) and registry-driven keyboard shortcuts with on-screen hints.
Build-error viewer that surfaces LaTeX compile failures with a one-click View action.
Custom frameless window with a platform-adaptive titlebar, plus light, sepia, and dark themes.
